subcodes.first_line: God willing, may ye in all times and seasons be ever-mindful of the Beloved of all existence, and partake of the living waters [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله در جمیع اوان و احیان بذکر محبوب امکان متذکر باشید و برحیق حیوان
subcodes.subjects: @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
